reviews.comment:
El único baño que funcionaba, estaba muy sucio y con falta de mantenimiento, no parecía un ACA
Los baños dentro del local estaban impecables, pero no estaban habilitados, desconozco el motivo
Para cargar combustible, la cola es siempre larga

(Translated by Google)
The only working restroom was filthy and poorly maintained; it didn't look like a proper ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina).
The restrooms inside the building were spotless, but they weren't open for use; I don't know why.
The line to get gas is always long.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4572994797407490123/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVd0xUNkxBEAE

Small station, which needs an image update.

reviews.comment:
El ACA siempre muy buen servicio. Los baños en muy buen estado. Lástima que suelen quedarse sin combustible. Aceptan tarjeta de débito y crédito. Centro de servicio en muy buen estado. Único punto de venta de combustible en la ciudad.

(Translated by Google)
The ACA always provides excellent service. The restrooms are in very good condition. It's a shame they often run out of fuel. They accept debit and credit cards. The service center is in very good condition. It's the only fuel station in the city.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4572994797407490123/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNncEpqN3lnRRAB
